sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: United Reaches New Agreement with Association of Flight Attendants
feed.summary: United Airlines and the Association of Flight Attendants-CWA have announced a new tentative agreement, aiming to make United flight attendants the best-paid in the industry. The agreement, which includes immediate raises, top wages of $100 per hour, boarding pay, and a $740 million signing bonus, is pending approval by the AFA's Master Executive Council and subsequent ratification by flight attendants. If approved, the contract will be amendable after five years.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment; Chubb Ltd (NYSE: CB) shows 0% ownership
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G indicating 0% beneficial ownership in Chubb Ltd (NYSE: CB) following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment caused certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report their beneficial ownership separately. The filing clarifies that this change reflects an organizational restructuring for reporting purposes, not an economic disposition of Chubb Ltd shares.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Updates NextEra Energy (NEE) Target on Load Growth and Data Center Demand
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for NextEra Energy (NEE) to $110 from $106, while maintaining an Overweight rating. This update considers increasing load growth, particularly from data centers, and new project developments. NextEra Energy is reportedly securing land in Texas for a gas-fired power plant to support a large data center campus, part of a 10 GW development plan approved by the US administration.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 BTSG shares (NYSE: BTSG)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for BrightSpring Health Services Inc. (BTSG), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The amendment reflects a change in reporting structure rather than a sale or purchase of shares, indicating a neutral immediate impact for investors.

feed.title: Airbnb Experiences: Transforming Travel into Immersive Local Adventures
feed.summary: Airbnb Experiences have become a significant growth driver for the company, moving beyond traditional lodging to offer immersive, locally-led activities. This segment helps diversify revenue, strengthens customer engagement by bundling experiences with stays, and taps into the growing experiential travel market. Despite facing competition and regulatory challenges, Experiences provide a unique differentiator for Airbnb, contributing to its overall financial health and appealing to modern travelers seeking authentic encounters.

feed.title: What triggered Canopy Growth shares' latest price pullback
feed.summary: Canopy Growth (CGC) shares experienced a 2.37% decline, trading at $0.95 and remaining below key moving averages, indicating persistent selling pressure. Technical indicators confirm a distinctly bearish outlook, with oversold conditions and weak trend strength, while experts offer mixed short-term views. Despite the current downtrend, some analysts see potential for a turnaround if buying momentum shifts and key resistance levels are overcome.

feed.title: BW and Scorpio back Cadeler’s fresh capital raise for fleet growth
feed.summary: Cadeler, a leading offshore wind vessel operator, has successfully raised $203 million in fresh equity to fund its fleet expansion, securing strong backing from existing investors BW Altor and Scorpio. The capital will be used for initial commitments for two new T-class wind foundation installation vessels and a potential scour protection vessel acquisition. This strategic move aims to position Cadeler for anticipated market tightening and further solidify its leadership in the growing offshore wind sector.

feed.title: Hertz and Other Rental Car Stocks Boosted By TSA Airport Chaos
feed.summary: Rental car stocks, including Hertz, are seeing a boost as spring break travelers, facing significant delays and chaos at airports due to TSA issues, opt to drive to their destinations instead of flying. This shift in travel plans away from air travel to road travel increases demand for rental vehicles.

feed.title: Bank of America launches M&A group for private equity exits
feed.summary: Bank of America has established a new private capital M&A group focused on providing tailored exit strategies for buyout clients. This unit operates within BofA's global M&A business and will collaborate with various industry teams. The article also touches on related private capital activities by BofA, including a significant investment in private credit.

feed.title: General Dynamics gets $15.3B Navy contract for more subs
feed.summary: General Dynamics Electric Boat Corp. has secured a $15.38 billion contract from the U.S. Navy to construct additional Columbia-class ballistic missile submarines and support related programs. This significant contract will see 21% of the work done at Groton, Connecticut, with other General Dynamics facilities and states contributing. U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal highlighted the contract's positive impact on national defense and Connecticut's economy, leading to substantial job creation and recognizing the skilled workforce at Electric Boat.

feed.title: Is Domino’s (DPZ) AI-Driven Tracker Upgrade a Meaningful Edge in Digital Ordering Economics?
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza recently upgraded its Tracker® platform with AI-powered timing estimates and other digital enhancements to deepen its online ordering experience. While this strengthens Domino's digital edge, it doesn't significantly alter the near-term catalyst of sustaining same-store sales or mitigate risks from a slow pizza market and intense competition. Investors should consider these factors alongside the company's 2026 operating income growth targets and its projected fair value of $478.58.

feed.title: Is There Now An Opportunity In Pool Corp (POOL) After A 36% One Year Slide
feed.summary: Pool Corp (POOL) has experienced a 36% decline over the past year, leading to questions about whether its current share price of around US$202 represents an opportunity. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 36.6%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $319.10 per share. However, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 18.39x is above Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" estimate of 14.86x, implying it's overvalued by that metric, highlighting conflicting valuation signals.

feed.title: Denton Walmart now offering drone delivery
feed.summary: Walmart has launched drone delivery services from another store in Denton, partnering with Zipline. This service allows for the delivery of small items, weighing 5.5 lbs or less, within a 2.5-mile radius of the University Drive location. Customers can access this service by downloading the Zipline mobile app to check availability and place orders.

feed.title: Vanguard (ACGL) amends ownership filing, reports 0 shares after realignment
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an Amendment No. 11 to a Schedule 13G/A for Arch Capital Group Ltd (ACGL), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment at Vanguard, leading to separate reporting by its subsidiaries in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that this is a change in reporting structure, not a market transaction involving the sale of ACGL shares by Vanguard.

feed.title: GSGR6347718 Bond Price and Chart — FINRA:GSGR6347718
feed.summary: This article provides details on the Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. 5.3% 30-MAR-2035 bond (FINRA:GSGR6347718), including its price, chart, and key terms like outstanding amount, face value, coupon, and maturity date. It also offers an overview of The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. and its operational segments. The content emphasizes the bond's characteristics and the issuer's financial activities.

feed.title: Stryker says manufacturing mostly restored after cyberattack
feed.summary: Medical device manufacturer Stryker announced that its operations are largely restored following a cyberattack on March 11 that disrupted order processing, manufacturing, and shipments. The company's stock rose 2% as it confirmed most critical production lines are back online. An Iran-linked hacking group, Handala, claimed responsibility for the attack.

feed.title: Vanguard entities disaggregate Allegion holdings (ALLE) after internal realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has amended its Schedule 13G/A for Allegion plc (ALLE), reporting zero beneficial ownership of Allegion common stock after an internal realignment, which means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their ownership separately. This change, effective January 12, 2026, is a reporting allocation rather than a market trade, relying on SEC Release No. 34-39538 for disaggregated reporting. Investors are advised to monitor future filings from Vanguard-affiliated entities for their actual Allegion positions.

feed.title: Brighthouse Financial (BHF) Rating Reinstated by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods | BHF Stock News
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reinstated its "Market Perform" rating for Brighthouse Financial (BHF) with a new price target of $67.00 USD. This update follows several recent rating changes from other firms and provides investors with fresh insights into the company's expected performance. Wall Street analysts currently forecast an average target price of $66.00 for BHF, implying a 9.04% upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $106.52, suggesting a 75.98% upside.

feed.title: 10 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Thursday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article lists ten consumer discretionary stocks that experienced significant price movements during Thursday's intraday trading session. It highlights both gainers like EpicQuest Education Group (EEIQ), VisionSys AI (VSA), Fitness Champs Hldgs (FCHL), Noodles (NDLS), MKDWell Tech (MKDW), and Navan (NAVN), and decliners such as Greenlane Hldgs (GNLN), E-Home Household Service (EJH), Baozun (BZUN), and Naas Technology (NAAS), noting their respective percentage changes and market capitalizations. Several companies also released Q4 earnings recently.

feed.title: United flight attendants could get $100 an hour under new deal
feed.summary: United Airlines and the Association of Flight Attendants-CWA have reached a tentative agreement that, if ratified, would significantly increase wages and improve working conditions for approximately 30,000 flight attendants. The deal includes immediate raises, top pay reaching $100 per hour, boarding pay, and a $740 million signing bonus pool. This agreement is subject to approval by the AFA Master Executive Council and ratification by the flight attendants.

feed.title: Coca-Cola celebrates America 250 with special bottles
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is releasing limited-edition bottles to celebrate America's 250th birthday, partnering with the America250 organization for nationwide events leading up to July 4th. This initiative mirrors a similar release for the 1976 U.S. bicentennial, with production already underway in Utah for distribution across the country. Coca-Cola aims to amplify its mission of "Refresh the World and Make a Difference" through this partnership.

feed.title: Coca-Cola celebrates America 250 with special bottles
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is releasing limited-edition bottles in partnership with America250 to commemorate the nation's 250th birthday. Production of these special bottles, similar to those for the 1976 bicentennial, has begun at a Utah plant for nationwide distribution. Coca-Cola is the largest corporate sponsor of America250, an organization established by Congress to plan events leading up to July 4th.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) Given Outperform Rating at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reiterated an "outperform" rating for Globe Life (NYSE:GL) with a $168 price target, indicating a potential 21.9% upside. While the company missed recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, it demonstrated strong margins and provided solid FY2026 EPS guidance. Insider selling by CMO and CEO was noted, but institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: Jefferies Financial Group Cuts Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) Price Target to $54.00
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has reduced its price target for Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) to $54.00 from $57.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 33.78% from the stock's current price, despite the wider Street consensus being a "Hold" with an average target of $43.17. The adjustment follows Enphase Energy's quarterly earnings report, where it beat EPS estimates but saw revenue decline by 10.3% year-over-year, leading to a 5.1% drop in shares.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for Verra Mobility (NASDAQ:VRRM) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Verra Mobility (NASDAQ:VRRM) from $21 to $19, while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of approximately 29% from the stock's previous close. Despite missing EPS estimates by $0.02, the company exceeded revenue expectations and provided FY2026 guidance of $1.32–1.38 EPS, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating among analysts with an average target of $23.50.

feed.title: More than 33 million people now bank on Wells Fargo’s mobile app
feed.summary: Wells Fargo announced significant digital milestones, including its AI-powered virtual assistant, Fargo, surpassing 1 billion interactions in less than three years. Additionally, the company recorded over 33 million mobile active users last month, demonstrating growing customer adoption of its digital banking platform. These achievements highlight how customers are increasingly using Wells Fargo's digital tools for everyday financial needs, with Fargo especially benefiting Spanish-speaking users.

feed.title: freenet AG: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
feed.summary: freenet AG has released a notification regarding major holdings, indicating that BlackRock, Inc. has crossed a voting rights threshold. As of March 20, 2026, BlackRock's total voting rights in freenet AG amount to 7.29%, comprising 6.37% attached to shares and 0.92% through instruments. This announcement is made in accordance with Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] for Europe-wide distribution.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. Stock: Navigating AI-Driven Growth and Defensive Appeal in a Volatile Tech Lands
feed.summary: Cisco Systems, Inc. is highlighted for its resilience and strategic shift from hardware to AI-enhanced software services, driven by innovations in AI security and strong financial performance. The company offers defensive appeal for North American investors with reliable dividends, consistent growth in software subscriptions, and robust cash flows. While positioned for AI-driven growth, potential risks include margin pressures and competition, requiring investors to monitor guidance and innovation closely.

feed.title: Hertz, Avis Soar as Airport Chaos Drives Boom in Rental Demand
feed.summary: A partial government shutdown leading to prolonged airport lines is driving a surge in demand for rental cars. Hertz and Avis have seen significant stock gains and increased website traffic as travelers seek alternatives to air travel congestion. Hertz is also offering discounts to capitalize on this shift in travel patterns.

feed.title: U.S. Bank’s Avvance Intros Longer-Term Home Improvement Loans
feed.summary: U.S. Bank has introduced extended-term home improvement loans for its Avvance point-of-sale lending platform, offering six-year and seven-year terms to finance higher-cost projects and provide greater payment flexibility. Avvance is also expanding its partner network to include Skeps, a multi-lender orchestration platform, enhancing merchants' ability to connect customers with appropriate financing offers. This move aligns with a broader consumer trend of viewing credit as a flexible financial tool, and the bank also provides financing for audiology, elective healthcare, and other big-ticket categories.

feed.title: Hyundai Recalls 46,000-Plus Palisades, Palisade Hybrids for Seat Belt Issue
feed.summary: Hyundai has issued another recall for over 46,700 model-year 2026 Palisade and Palisade Hybrid SUVs in the Limited and Calligraphy trim levels. This recall addresses a seat belt status indicator issue where an internal wiring problem can cause the third-row driver-side seat belt to permanently display as buckled, even if it's not. To fix this, dealers will install a wiring harness extension and replace the seat belt assembly free of charge, with owner notifications starting May 18.

feed.title: Hershey's Releases New Dark Chocolate Raspberry Decadence Nuggets
feed.summary: Hershey's has expanded its Nuggets lineup by introducing the new Dark Chocolate Raspberry Decadence, combining dark chocolate with a raspberry-flavored creme filling. These new candies are currently available online and are expected to appear in major grocery chains soon. This release follows other recent Hershey's innovations like Shaq-A-Licious Slams and a Dubai-Inspired Chocolate Bar.

feed.title: Dow's 168-point fall led by losses in shares of NVIDIA Corp., Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 168 points, primarily driven by declines in shares of NVIDIA Corp. and Goldman Sachs. This indicates a negative day for the index, with these two prominent companies contributing significantly to the overall market downturn.

feed.title: Avis Budget (CAR) Surges Over 17% in Market Rally
feed.summary: Avis Budget (CAR) shares surged 17.1% to $144.70, indicating significant investor interest despite financial challenges. The company, a prominent mobility solutions provider, faces a high debt load and negative profitability, reflected in a poor Altman Z-Score and low interest coverage. While institutional and insider ownership is high, analysts suggest a "hold" with a target price lower than the current trading value.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. Stock: Da Vinci Systems Drive Long-Term Growth in Robotic Surgery Market
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISIN: US46120E6023) is a leader in robotic-assisted surgery with its da Vinci platform, offering investors exposure to growing minimally invasive procedures. The company's core business model relies on system sales, instruments, accessories, and services, creating a recurring revenue stream. Its competitive moat is strengthened by extensive surgeon training programs, a vast data ecosystem, and strong patent protection, making it a key player in the expanding robotic surgery market despite increasing competition.

feed.title: Investors Purchase High Volume of CF Industries Call Options (NYSE:CF)
feed.summary: Investors purchased a significantly higher volume of call options for CF Industries (NYSE:CF) on Thursday, with volumes 37% above average, as the stock rose 2.8%. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Despite insider selling activity, institutional investors hold a substantial stake, and analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $104.60.

feed.title: AXT Sees Unusually High Options Volume (NASDAQ:AXTI)
feed.summary: AXT (NASDAQ:AXTI) experienced unusually high options trading volume on Thursday, with traders purchasing 15,725 call options, a 92% increase over the typical daily volume. This activity comes amidst significant insider selling by CEO Morris S. Young and Director Jesse Chen, alongside mixed analyst ratings and the company missing its recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) Reaches New 1-Year High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) recently achieved a new 52-week high of $217.51, following strong quarterly results that surpassed expectations, with EPS of $2.00 and revenue of $6.64 billion. Several analysts have raised their price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.445, signaling positive financial health despite recent insider share sales.

feed.title: A Look At Bank Of Montreal’s (TSX:BMO) Valuation As Investor Focus Splits On Fair Value Estimates
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) has seen mixed short-term share performance, with a 0.9% gain over the past day but a 2.8% decline over the past month. Despite this, longer-term momentum remains solid with a 41.6% one-year return. Analysts present differing valuations, with one narrative suggesting BMO is 16.2% overvalued at CA$163.00, while a DCF model implies it is 34% undervalued at CA$287.61.

feed.title: A Look At Bank Of Montreal’s (TSX:BMO) Valuation As Investor Focus Splits On Fair Value Estimates
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) shares have seen mixed short-term performance but solid longer-term momentum. While one valuation narrative suggests BMO is overpriced at CA$163.00, another based on discounted cash flows indicates the stock is undervalued at CA$287.61, implying a 34% discount. Investors are encouraged to consider both perspectives and risks, especially ahead of the upcoming Investor Day.

feed.title: Toyota's Production Problems Mean the 2026 RAV4 Is Pricey and Hard to Find
feed.summary: Toyota is facing significant production challenges with its redesigned 2026 RAV4, leading to low inventory, higher prices, and difficulty for consumers to find the popular SUV. The issues stem from plant retooling required for the new generation, with US plants not yet fully operational, making Japan the primary supplier. This scarcity has caused 2026 RAV4s to sell quickly and often above MSRP, impacting overall automotive sales due to the model's high volume.

feed.title: BMO hires Joe Kostandoff from CIBC for equities leadership role
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal has appointed Joe Kostandoff, formerly of CIBC, to co-lead its equity capital markets division. This move coincides with long-time leader Peter Miller transitioning into a vice-chair role within investment and corporate banking. Kostandoff is expected to join BMO in June, and Eric Benedict will continue as co-head of global ECM alongside him, both reporting to Carrie Cook.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Lowers Jefferies Financial Group (JEF) Price Targe
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Jefferies Financial Group (JEF) but has lowered its price target from $54 to $47, a 12.96% decrease. This adjustment, released on March 26, 2026, reflects updated expectations while maintaining confidence in the company. Other analysts have also recently adjusted their price targets for JEF, with the average target price from 5 analysts being $54.20, suggesting a potential upside of 36.25% from its current price of $39.78.

feed.title: Berkshire Hathaway (A) Stock: Warren Buffett's Conglomerate Model and Long-Term Value for North Amer
feed.summary: This article examines Berkshire Hathaway (A) stock, highlighting Warren Buffett's conglomerate model and its long-term value for North American investors. It details Berkshire's diversified portfolio including insurance, railroads, and utilities, emphasizing its conservative approach, disciplined capital management, and substantial cash reserves. The article also discusses key subsidiaries, capital allocation strategies, and relevance for investors, alongside potential risks and future catalysts.

feed.title: Stryker restores manufacturing after cyberattack (SYK:NYSE)
feed.summary: Stryker (SYK) shares rebounded after Bloomberg reported that the company has restored most of its manufacturing operations following a recent cyberattack. The MedTech firm had experienced disruptions to its global systems due to the incident earlier this month. Manufacturing capabilities are now quickly ramping up.

feed.title: This New Perk for Amex’s Business Cards Is a Big Bet on the Future of AI
feed.summary: American Express has introduced a new perk for its U.S. Business Platinum and Business Gold cards: a $300 annual statement credit for ChatGPT Business subscriptions. This initiative reflects Amex's belief in the growing importance of AI in enterprise and aims to help small business owners save time and increase productivity. The credit could cover ChatGPT access for up to a dozen employees annually, aligning with Amex's observations that AI significantly benefits businesses.

feed.title: Alvernia and Caterpillar collaborate to strengthen STEM education
feed.summary: Alvernia University's Total Experience Learning Institute has received a $1.04 million grant from Caterpillar Inc. to expand STEM education and educator development. This two-year initiative will initially launch with Berks County school districts to strengthen foundational STEM skills and address the shortage of skilled talent and qualified educators. The program aims to equip educators with strategies for relevant, real-world learning, ultimately benefiting over 9,200 students and educators and promoting regional economic vitality.

feed.title: HPE Stock Today: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Holds Near Highs After Evercore Target Lift
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) shares pulled back slightly after two strong sessions, but continue to hold near recent highs. This follows Evercore ISI raising its price target on HPE to $30 due to stronger CPU-driven server demand, acknowledging HPE's significant AI backlog exceeding $5 billion. The article highlights the broader market trend of investors focusing on companies providing essential AI infrastructure beyond just chipmakers, despite ongoing challenges with supply costs and the Juniper deal risk.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal targets 15% return on equity on wealth, US businesses growth
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) aims for a return on equity exceeding 15% by 2028, driven by growth in its wealth management and U.S. businesses. CEO Darryl White emphasized the bank's strong North American capital markets and long-term strategy amidst geopolitical tensions. This target follows a 12.1% first-quarter return on equity, showcasing the bank's efficiency in generating shareholder profit.

feed.title: Best Buy Stock Surges as FY26 Earnings Impress Amid Uncertainty
feed.summary: Best Buy's stock surged by 4.54% following its strong fiscal year 2026 Q4 earnings report, which exceeded adjusted earnings per share expectations. Despite slight revenue shortfalls and cautious FY27 guidance, the company's strategic focus on cost management, high-margin initiatives, and robust capital return programs have bolstered investor confidence. Analysts maintain "buy" recommendations, acknowledging the company's resilience in navigating uncertain market conditions.
